inputs.label: Total Energy Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Total energy used in the facility over the reporting period. Based on ISO 50001 energy management standards.

inputs.label: Production Output
inputs.businessContext: Total units produced in the same period. Used to calculate energy intensity per unit.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of energy (electricity, gas, etc.) per kWh. Based on utility bills.

inputs.label: Baseline Energy Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Historical or benchmark energy intensity for comparison. Used to calculate savings.

inputs.label: Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total operating hours in the period (e.g., 8760 for continuous annual operation).

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in data accuracy. Adjusts final results for uncertainty.

thresholds.energyIntensityRatio: if energyIntensityRatio > 1.2 then 'High energy intensity compared to baseline'
thresholds.energyCostRatio: if energyCostRatio > 0.2 then 'Energy cost exceeds 20% of production value'

hiddenLossDrivers: if energyIntensityRatio > 1.2 then 'High energy intensity compared to baseline'
if energyCostRatio > 0.2 then 'Energy cost exceeds 20% of production value'
suggestedActions: Conduct energy audit to identify inefficiencies
Implement energy management system per ISO 50001
Optimize production scheduling to reduce peak demand
